label: Transfer Disclosure Statement
description: CA Civil Code §1102 — discloses all known defects and material facts

label: Seller Property Questionnaire
description: Supplements the TDS with detailed property history, permits, and claims

label: Lead-Based Paint Disclosure
description: Federal requirement for homes built before 1978

label: HOA / CC&R Addendum
description: Monthly dues, special assessments, transfer fees, and known violations

label: Buyer's Advisory
description: CAR Form BA — covers inspections, zoning, schools, insurance, natural hazards

label: Agent Visual Inspection Disclosure
description: Documents agent's visual inspection findings for listing

label: FIRPTA Disclosure
description: Required when seller is a foreign person or entity

label: Residential Purchase Agreement
description: CAR Form RPA — the primary offer and purchase contract
